description: App-local runtime configuration for ac-dc-app's SmartPhrase palette (Step 5). Currently holds declarative triggers describing when each SmartPhrase role is implicitly satisfied by the current Step 3 endpoint spec. These triggers are app dynamics — they reference endpoint-spec runtime state (dimensionValues, linkedBCIds, conceptCategory, parameterName) — so they live outside the transformation library, which is reserved for metadata about concepts, methods, and transformations. The non-trigger role metadata (role name, label, contextSource, display order) remains in lib/transformations/ACDC_Transformation_Library_v06.json::roleDefinitions because it describes the role itself and is not app-specific runtime state. Consumed by ac-dc-app/js/utils/phrase-engine.js::deriveImplicitPhraseOids via ac-dc-app/js/utils/phrase-engine.js::evaluateTrigger.
